use_cases: Displaying key performance metrics in a dashboard interface
Showing statistical data with visual charts using Recharts
Presenting comparative metrics in a card format
Creating data visualization widgets for analytics dashboards
Building dashboard sections with multiple stat cards
ai_summary: A stats card component with integrated charting capabilities using Recharts. Features a clean card layout with customizable chart configurations for displaying metrics and statistical data in dashboards. Designed for displaying key performance indicators across various industries with a minimalist flat visual style.
